title: --protect-lib fails with clang
body:
./configure CXX=clang++

Then testing fails the protect tests due to:

     ccache clang++  -I. -Wall -Wextra -Wfloat-conversion -Wthread-safety -Werror -MMD -I/verilator/include -I/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -faligned-new -fbracket-depth=4096 -Qunused-arguments -Wno-parentheses-equality -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow     -fPIC   -c -o secret.o secret.cpp
        secret.cpp:18:32: error: implicit conversion from 'long' to 'int' changes value from 2256956716 to -2038010580 [-Werror,-Wconstant-conversion]
        int expected_hash__V = 2256956716;

(Perhaps int should be unsigned?) Commenting that out gives a bigger issue:

    ccache clang++  -I. -Wall -Wextra -Wfloat-conversion -Wthread-safety -Werror -MMD -I/verilator/include -I/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -faligned-new -fbracket-depth=4096 -Qunused-arguments -Wno-parentheses-equality -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow     -fPIC   -shared -o libsecret.so secret.cpp Vt_prot_lib_secret__ALL.a verilated.o secret.cpp Vt_prot_lib_secret.h /verilator/include/verilated_heavy.h /verilator/include/verilated.h /verilator/include/verilatedos.h /verilator/include/verilated_dpi.h /verilator/include/verilated_sym_props.h /verilator/include/vltstd/svdpi.h
    clang: error: treating 'c-header' input as 'c++-header' when in C++ mode, this behavior is deprecated [-Werror,-Wdeprecated]
    clang: error: cannot specify -o when generating multiple output files
    Vt_prot_lib_secret.mk:61: recipe for target 'libsecret.so' failed

The .h files shouldn't be on the compiler line.

Thanks
